name: Corn and Bacon Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large skillet until crisp. Drain and set aside, reserving 2 tablespoons of drippings.
2. Crumble the bacon and place it aside.
3. Sauté onion in the reserved drippings until tender. Add flour, garlic, salt, and pepper. Cook and stir until bubbly, then cook and stir for an additional minute.
4. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream until smooth. Mix in corn, parsley, and half of the bacon.
5. Pour the mixture into a 1-quart baking dish. Sprinkle with remaining bacon.
6. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until heated through.
7. Sprinkle with chives before serving.
